title: Automated fire extinguisher
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Automatedfireextinguisher.png|thumb|right|An automated fire extinguisher.]]

'''Automated fire extinguishers''' were simple [[Droid/Legends|droids]] used around [[3951 BBY]]. Mounted on turrets, they used [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] freeze rays to put out fires, or, if their programming was altered as happened at the [[Peragus Mining Facility]], to freeze living beings where they stood. In the case of Peragus, [[HK-50 series assassin droid|HK-50]] was responsible for the alteration of their programming to prevent the miners from capturing the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]].

{{Droid-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
